---
name: New case proposal
about: Propose a new composition case for the library
title: "[Case proposal] "
labels: case-proposal
---

## Surface or decision class

Where in the agent lifecycle does your proposed case operate? Which topology (wallet-bound aggregation, action-time gating)?

## Dimensions involved

Which Envelope dimensions are paired in this case? List by issuer.

## Failure modes you plan to document

Briefly: what are the two (or more) failure modes that single-dimension evaluation structurally cannot detect at this surface?

## Issuer attribution

Who will be named as contributor(s) on this case? Confirm that each named issuer has sign-off.

## Timeline

Rough timeline for a v1 draft? (no commitment; just helps with sequencing.)

## Anything else

Questions, overlap with work-in-progress, related format-fit notes?
